tools.name: oi_status
tools.title: Open Interpreter Status
tools.description: Report whether Open Interpreter is installed, the configured model topology, telemetry posture, and durable data root.

tools.name: oi_run_task
tools.title: Open Interpreter Bounded Task
tools.description: Run one bounded Open Interpreter task in offline/local mode with a strict timeout. Auto-run is rejected by default; callers must pass execution_mode="explicit" to allow shell/code execution.
